titles.en: Chapter 8 – Regarding the ettiquiettes of the birth
Chapter 8 – Regarding the ettiquiettes of the birth

segments: كَانَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا حَضَرَتْ وِلَادَةُ الْمَرْأَةِ قَالَ أَخْرِجُوا مَنْ فِي الْبَيْتِ مِنَ النِّسَاءِ لَا يَكُونُ أَوَّلَ نَاظِرٍ إِلَى عَوْرَةٍ .
arabic.text: كَانَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا حَضَرَتْ وِلَادَةُ الْمَرْأَةِ قَالَ أَخْرِجُوا مَنْ فِي الْبَيْتِ مِنَ النِّسَاءِ لَا يَكُونُ أَوَّلَ نَاظِرٍ إِلَى عَوْرَةٍ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from his father, from Abdullah Bin Al Mugheira, from Al Sakuny, from Jabir,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Whenever a birth for a wife presented itself for Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>, he used to say: ‘Exit the ones from the women out from the house, they would not be the first ones to look at privacy’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from his father, from Abdullah Bin Al Mugheira, from Al Sakuny, from Jabir,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Whenever a birth for a wife presented itself for Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>, he used to say: ‘Exit the ones from the women out from the house, they would not be the first ones to look at privacy’.

segments: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from ‘Abd Allah ibn Muhammad from his father from ‘Abd Allah ibn al-Mughirah from ibn Muskan from Jabir who has said the following: “At the time of the birth of a child, Ali ibn al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would say, ’Send all women out of the house; they must not be the first to look at the privacy [genitals].
en.sarwar.text: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from ‘Abd Allah ibn Muhammad from his father from ‘Abd Allah ibn al-Mughirah from ibn Muskan from Jabir who has said the following: “At the time of the birth of a child, Ali ibn al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would say, ’Send all women out of the house; they must not be the first to look at the privacy [genitals].

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/29)

gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/29)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ عَنِ السَّكُونِيِّ عَنْ جَابِرٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
